title: Assessment Update Online
oneLiner: Voice-guided tour for use case: Assessment Update Online

steps.label: Landing page ready
steps.observe: Home page is open. Auto voice tour begins — no blue-tag clicks needed.

steps.label: Open Assessment uploads (CSV)
steps.observe: Tabbed Internship, Jobs, Drive, Projects — export CSV per tab.

steps.label: Open Assessment Update Online
steps.observe: Inline editable hiring_result rows per application.

steps.label: Edit hiring_result inline — manual
steps.observe: Change round values; Save changes shows dirty row count.

steps.label: Submit results when complete — manual
steps.observe: Submit locks further CSV and online edits for that context.

steps.label: Open Hiring Results Dashboard
steps.observe: Read-only summary of submitted assessment outcomes.

steps.label: College opens Hiring Assessment
steps.observe: Read-only mirror of employer submitted results.

steps.label: Navigate to college Hiring Assessment
steps.observe: Same outcomes visible to college TPO.
